creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
On Mon, Mar 05, 2007 at 08:52:10AM -0600, Josh Paetzel wrote:
> Edwin, what am I doing that is making it seem like I'm not the 
> maintainer of these ports? I'm using the same email address that's 
> listed in the MAINTAINER section of the port.

This is what I get for your email address:

From: "\"Josh Paetzel\" <Josh Paetzel" <josh@tcbug.org>

Which happily confuses my parser :-)

Edwin
